result.summary: Oracle exposes MCP surfaces for Autonomous AI Database and SQLcl, a GraphQL surface in Oracle REST Data Services, and Oracle Health Millennium/Soarian FHIR APIs requiring an Oracle Health Developer Program app.

oracle_health_app.label: Oracle Health Developer Program app
oracle_health_app.setup: Register an app in the [Oracle Health Developer Program console](https://code-console.cerner.com/). For consumer access apps, follow the Oracle Health API access page and the linked terms, then use the app to access the Millennium or Soarian FHIR APIs. The app registration is the developer-minted credential Oracle Health issues for API access.

surfaces.name: Oracle Autonomous AI Database MCP Server
Oracle Health Millennium and Soarian FHIR APIs
